sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 41 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.63/2021 2. For hearing of main case 20.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel questions framed for determination stand squarely decided against the department by virtue of judgment of honourable Supreme Court in Millat Tractor’s case reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view hereof, he states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
